title: 2026-01-12 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 19.33
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2026-01-12: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 19.33/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and front-end rate pressure shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2026-01-12, the score printed 19.33/100 in the low regime, with inflation expectations and front-end rate pressure doing most of the work.
